notes: v0.11.1 — TEST mode FULL visual rework. v0.11.0 zmienialo tylko shipy i bullety (zglosil to user). Teraz przerobione CALOSC: arena, podloga, sciany, particles, shockwave, ripple. DOODLE = cream paper z linijkami zeszytowymi + red margin + wobbly ink boundary + ink stain wash + corner stars + crayon walls z hatched shading + pencil-dash particles. POP ART = blue halftone-dot floor + comic speed lines + thick black border (kick-pulse) + bass-driven energy rings + corner POW! sticker (snare-pulse) + halftone-dotted walls z diagonal shine + jagged comic-burst shockwaves. Muzyka i beat hooks bez zmian; testerzy widza prawdziwy stylowy match.
